summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned. None has complete merge preflight proof with Codex /review, so no merge_candidate action is safe. #90280 needs repair because required checks are failing; #90328 needs maintainer review because the hydrated artifact shows a broad compatibility-facing protocol/UI change set; the remaining PRs are independent maintainer-ready candidates but not merge-planned without full merge preflight.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #90280 on its existing branch so the Zalo token resolver symlink capability test is reliable and required checks pass before any merge consideration.
repair_candidate.pr_title: test: repair Zalo token symlink capability check
repair_candidate.pr_body: Repair path for #90280. This should update the existing contributor branch when possible because maintainer_can_modify is true, keep the change limited to extensions/zalo/src/token.test.ts, preserve attribution to @aniruddhaadak80 from source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90280, and rerun the Zalo token test plus the failing required checks before merge preflight.
validation_commands: rerun required GitHub checks for #90280, including Real behavior proof and checks-node-core-fast
run Codex /review before any merge recommendation
credit_notes: Repair should preserve contributor branch credit for @aniruddhaadak80 from source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90280.
If a replacement PR becomes necessary later, its body must explicitly credit @aniruddhaadak80 and link source PR #90280.
